claim_boundary.at_rest_encryption: not implemented or evaluated by this local reference pipeline
claim_boundary.inclusion: establishes membership in the declared local tree state for the supplied path
claim_boundary.issuer_signature: detects unauthorised changes under the declared key registry; it does not prove identity, consent truth, policy truth or clinical truth
claim_boundary.non_equivocation: not established without retained state, gossip, witnessing or another cross-verifier comparison mechanism
claim_boundary.payload_commitment: binds exact candidate bytes, framing and nonce; it is not encryption or confidentiality
claim_boundary.receipt_signature: authenticates the project receipt under the declared backend key registry; it does not prove completeness
claim_boundary.replay: exact same-state replay is accepted; freshness and duplicate suppression are outside the bounded verifier
claim_boundary.retained_checkpoint: detects rollback and verifier-visible same-size forks and requires a valid prefix-extension proof before local state advances
claim_boundary.transport_encryption: not implemented or evaluated by this local reference pipeline
